title: Finnish Drinking Habits Survey: Abstaining Occasions 2016
description: This dataset is one of the three datasets belonging to the Finnish Drinking Habits Survey 2016 (other datasets in the survey: FSD3282 and FSD3313). The dataset contains information on drinking occasions during which the respondents were present but abstained from drinking. FSD's holdings also include a "drinking occasions" dataset collected for the same study (FSD3313). The survey charted situations where someone else had consumed alcohol but the respondents had abstained: type of the situation
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
